channel.title: The Shadow Files
channel.description: Real horror stories. Real people. Real places. The Shadow Files is a true scary story podcast for listeners who like the lights off and the door locked. Every episode is a single unsettling first-person account, 12 to 15 minutes. New episodes Sunday, Tuesday and Thursday.
channel.itunes:author: The Shadow Files
channel.itunes:summary: Real horror stories. Real people. Real places. The Shadow Files is a true scary story podcast for listeners who like the lights off and the door locked. Every episode is a single unsettling first-person account, 12 to 15 minutes. New episodes Sunday, Tuesday and Thursday.

item.title: The Security Guard At My College Told Me Something Before He Disappeared
item.description:
A security guard at my college told me a building was finished waiting. He told me not to use the side exit anymore. He hasn't been seen since.
I won't say which school. I have my reasons.
Subscribe if you want more stories like this.
CHAPTERS 0:00 The warning 1:26 Old building, sealed basement 2:51 Mr. Osei 4:26 What he said 6:41 I drove home 8:01 Looking for him 9:31 What my RA told me 10:41 The window at dusk 11:56 Facilities won't go down there 13:06 The knocks at 2:14
⸺ Disclaimer: This story is shared for entertainment purposes. Names, locations, and identifying details have been changed. The events depicted may be fictional, exaggerated, or based on submitted accounts that have not been independently verified. Viewer discretion is advised. ⸺
#horrorstories #truescarystories #college #paranormal #theshadowfiles
item.itunes:summary:
A security guard at my college told me a building was finished waiting. He told me not to use the side exit anymore. He hasn't been seen since.
I won't say which school. I have my reasons.
Subscribe if you want more stories like this.

item.title: I Worked At A Fire Lookout In Oregon. Then A Dead Radio Tower Started Calling Me.
item.description:
Three summers ago I worked a wildfire lookout tower in the Cascade Range in Oregon. On my eighty-third night I picked up a radio transmission from a tower that has been decommissioned since 1989. I haven't worked another lookout season since.
I won't say which ranger district. I have my reasons.
Subscribe if you want more stories like this.
CHAPTERS 0:00 The lookout 0:55 Lookout life 1:28 Bear Wallow tower 2:04 My third season 2:36 First week, voice on the wind 3:38 Day 83, the radio 4:09 11 PM, channel 4 4:42 Triangle Peak 5:19 He told me to come down 6:14 Lock the door 6:44 Dispatch is silent 7:24 Footsteps on the catwalk 7:57 The trapdoor 8:16 Sunrise 8:36 I called dispatch 8:59 Boot prints in the dust 9:47 She lasted 14 days 10:38 The following spring 11:05 Boards pulled from the inside 11:12 Six weeks ago
⸺ Disclaimer: This story is shared for entertainment purposes. Names, locations, and identifying details have been changed. The events depicted may be fictional, exaggerated, or based on submitted accounts that have not been independently verified. Viewer discretion is advised. ⸺
#horrorstories #truescarystories #wilderness #firelookout #paranormal #theshadowfiles
item.itunes:summary:
Three summers ago I worked a wildfire lookout tower in the Cascade Range in Oregon. On my eighty-third night I picked up a radio transmission from a tower that has been decommissioned since 1989. I haven't worked another lookout season since.
I won't say which ranger district. I have my reasons.
Subscribe if you want more stories like this.
CHAPTERS 0:00 The lookout 0:55 Lookout life 1:28 Bear Wallow tower 2:04 My third season 2:36 First week, voice on the wind 3:38 Day 83, the radio 4:09 11

item.title: Five Of My Friends Went Into Those Woods. I Was The Only One Who Came Back.
item.description:
Three Octobers ago I went on a hike in southeast Ohio with five friends. Something in the trees started crying for help in their voices. They never found the bodies.
I won't say which forest. I have my reasons.
Subscribe if you want more stories like this.
⸺ Disclaimer: This story is shared for entertainment purposes. Names, locations, and identifying details have been changed. The events depicted may be fictional, exaggerated, or based on submitted accounts that have not been independently verified. Viewer discretion is advised. ⸺
#horrorstories #truescarystories #paranormal #theshadowfiles

item.title: The White Machine Room | The Shadow Files
item.description:
Story dropped today.
I won't say where exactly. I have my reasons.
Subscribe if you want more stories like this.
